pauseForMilliseconds.note: wire-up: real implementation in browser-renderer.ts and null-platform.ts; wired in input-keystrokes.ts; test context stub returns false

takeScreenshot.note: intentional-gap: SDL2-only platform function; no browser equivalent; browser cannot capture screenshots this way

notifyEvent.note: wire-up: real implementation in browser-renderer.ts; wired in game-lifecycle.ts; lifecycle-gameover.ts has a stub for test context

removeItemFromArray.note: wire-up: TS utility fully implemented and used throughout; lifecycle.ts stub is in an unused machine context code path

isApplicationActive.note: intentional-gap: platform function; browser tab is always active; wired as () => true in menus.ts

initializeLaunchArguments.note: intentional-gap: native CLI launch arguments; no browser equivalent; wired as () => {} in menus.ts

assureCosmeticRNG.note: recording: RNG save/restore pair used to ensure cosmetic display is seeded from cosmetic RNG; part of recording/playback system; defer to port-v2-persistence

restoreRNG.note: recording: RNG save/restore pair; counterpart to assureCosmeticRNG; defer to port-v2-persistence
